name: zero-powers
description: go-zero microservices development plugin with domain skills and specialized review agents.

interface.shortDescription: go-zero skills, patterns, and review workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Zero Powers when designing, implementing, testing, or reviewing go-zero microservices across REST API, RPC, database, resilience, observability, deployment, event-driven, security, and goctl workflows.
defaultPrompt: Review this go-zero service for production readiness.
